items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER shoulder bag
Model: 289676
Dimensions: 19-13-7cm
The new "Serpenti Forever" series shoulder bag highlights urban style and fashion versatility, adding a unique trendy touch to the Serpenti world. This bag is crafted from peach-colored calfskin with light gold-plated brass accessories. Black and white agate enamel and green malachite sensual eyes add a bewitching charm to the classic snake head clasp. An adjustable serpentine chain and leather shoulder strap easily match stylish daywear.
Small size, two compartments, and a delicate vanity mirror on one side that can be personalized. An unremovable credit card holder, an open pocket, a zip pocket, and two external pockets.

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Style: 293665
Size: 20.5 X 15 X 9

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
 【BVLGAR*】💋Serpenti Forever, a new masterpiece for the world 🌝, adding radiance to the Serpenti family and enriching the series. This bag features a white calfskin body, with white agate and pink crystal calfskin on the sides, paired with light gold-plated brass accessories. White and pink enamel paired with black onyx sensual eyes 😊, embellishing the classic snake head clasp with bewitching charm.
The handbag style has three storage compartments and comes with a detachable cocoa adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, offering versatile styling. Small size, zip pocket, with a small makeup mirror. Let you be a delicate girl every moment ❤
size:22.5×18.5×11cm model: 289835

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Series Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from white calfskin leather, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde design.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap, adorned with a classic snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and a BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Size: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104

Genuine quality
 The SERPENTI CABOCHON mini shoulder bag features a distinctive large-scale graphic pattern and bold metal texture details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with its exquisite, practical, unique design and modern style.
This bag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile styling suitable for both day and night.
Extra-small size with one storage compartment and one card slot. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the interior metal plate.
Model: 291085
Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 cm
